VEDABOSS_AI_AGENT.purpose: The single source of truth for all work assignments. No agent starts any work without VEDABOSS approval. VEDABOSS breaks the 48-step build plan into agent-sized tasks, assigns them, reviews completions, resolves conflicts, and integrates work.

PROJECT_AI_AGENT.purpose: Maintains the project board, tracks milestones, identifies blockers, manages dependencies between agents, ensures the 48-step plan is on schedule.

PRODUCT_AI_AGENT.purpose: Owns the product spec. Makes decisions on feature behavior, edge cases, UX flow, and prioritization when the spec is ambiguous. Writes user stories and acceptance criteria.

UI_UX_AI_AGENT.purpose: Owns the design system (colors, typography, spacing, components). Creates component specifications, responsive breakpoints, accessibility guidelines. Reviews all UI code for design compliance.

QUALITY_CONTROL_AI_AGENT.purpose: Reviews all code before it is marked 'approved'. Checks for: architecture compliance, security issues, performance, code quality, consistency with spec. Can reject work and send it back to the developer.

TESTER_1_AI_AGENT.purpose: Writes and runs Vitest unit tests. Tests individual functions, API route handlers, utilities. Ensures all critical paths are covered.

TESTER_2_AI_AGENT.purpose: Writes and runs Playwright E2E tests. Tests full user flows: login, dashboard, create compliance, view details, admin panel, mobile screens.

DEVELOPER_1_AI_AGENT.purpose: Builds the foundation: monorepo setup, shared types, Drizzle ORM schemas (23 tables), SQL migrations, RLS policies, API client package.

DEVELOPER_2_AI_AGENT.purpose: Builds the platform layer: Next.js layout, auth system (passcode, magic link, sessions), JWT middleware, RBAC, multi-tenancy, organisation APIs, user management, departments.

DEVELOPER_3_AI_AGENT.purpose: Builds all backend feature APIs: compliance engine, audit points, documents, notifications, AI engine (Claude), MCP endpoint, API tokens, webhooks, sales/agent portal, email integration.

DEVELOPER_4_AI_AGENT.purpose: Builds the web frontend core: shared UI components, login/auth pages, app shell (sidebar, header), dashboard, compliance table, compliance detail slide-out panel.

DEVELOPER_5_AI_AGENT.purpose: Builds: admin panel, audit log viewer, AI chat, mobile app (Expo), export engine, integration stubs, onboarding wizard, tests, landing page, CI/CD, deployment, realtime, final verification.

workflow.step_1_agent_checks_in: Agent reads VEDABOSS/WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json to get their next task
workflow.step_2_agent_reads_spec: Agent reads the relevant spec files (from specs/ and ai-instructions/)
workflow.step_3_agent_does_work: Agent generates code and saves to agents/<AGENT_NAME>/output/
workflow.step_4_agent_reports: Agent updates VEDABOSS/WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json with status='completed' and files_created
workflow.step_6_vedaboss_approves: VEDABOSS marks task as 'approved' and assigns next task
workflow.step_7_integrated: Approved files are copied to the main compliance-tracker/ directory by VEDABOSS

dependency_chain.DEV_1: Must complete FIRST (steps 1-9). All other developers depend on shared types, DB schemas, and API client.
dependency_chain.DEV_2: Starts after DEV_1 completes step 4 (types + schemas). Builds on top of DB layer.
dependency_chain.DEV_3: Starts after DEV_2 completes step 12 (auth routes). Needs auth middleware and RBAC to exist.
dependency_chain.DEV_4: Starts after DEV_1 completes step 3 (shared types) AND DEV_3 has some APIs ready.
dependency_chain.DEV_5: Starts after DEV_4 has the app shell. Parallel with DEV_4 on later steps.
dependency_chain.TESTER_1: Starts after DEV_3 completes step 17 (compliance APIs). Tests backend.
dependency_chain.TESTER_2: Starts after DEV_4 completes step 28 (dashboard). Tests frontend.
dependency_chain.QC: Reviews work from all developers as it completes.
dependency_chain.PRODUCT: Active when specs are ambiguous, answers questions.
dependency_chain.UI_UX: Active before DEV_4 starts, provides design specs.
